description: Illustrative MCP tool sketch for CCP Facility Truth. JSON Schema remains the canonical CCP contract. Facility Truth v1 covers public-fact scopes only and does not require a PermissionGrant.

tools.name: ccp_facility_truth_request
tools.title: Request CCP Facility Truth
tools.description: Look up one facility's public-fact truth record (profile, hours, services, contact methods, service area, acceptance criteria, booking links, policy summaries). The server evaluates requester identity, facility identity, scopes, purpose, visibility classes, and freshness. Public-fact scopes do not require a PermissionGrant in v1. Protocol-level denials return a CCP response envelope with status `denied`.
